prompt: Use $new-feature-sdlc-skill on an approved feature in a repository that already has `docs/adr/`, `docs/architecture/`, and a release checklist under `.github/`. Reuse those local conventions instead of introducing parallel folders.
assertions: The run reuses existing repo conventions when they are available.
The run does not create duplicate parallel documentation structures without justification.
The run includes release or closeout updates in the repo's native location when relevant.
The run still preserves traceability and verification discipline.
